description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the mgoral/super-ci-runner:latest Docker image and runs a global before_script installing virtualenv and tox via pip and executing ./configure with --skip-deps-check and --no-install-man. Add a build job that runs make, make install, and make uninstall in the default stage. Add a test job that runs make check-tox in the default stage. Add a test-docs job that runs make man, make install-man, and make uninstall-man in the default stage, with no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
